name: Columbia 10" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
description_short: The Columbia 10" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box combines 30% higher mud capacity with a specialized inside-track wheel design optimized for precision butt joint finishing. Compatible with all major flat box handles and backed by a 5-year manufacturer warranty for professional-grade reliability.
description_full:
## Higher Capacity, Superior Butt Joint Precision

The Columbia 10" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box is engineered for the professional who demands both higher output and greater precision on butt joints. With a 30% increase in mud capacity over standard flat box models, this tool extends your run time between pump trips, allowing you to maintain a steady, productive workflow on large-scale flat finishing projects. The result is more wall covered, less time spent reloading, and a cleaner finished surface from start to finish.

## Precision Inside-Track Technology

The defining feature of the Inside Track design is the positioning of the wheels inside the side plates. This configuration provides superior tracking stability specifically optimized for finishing butt joints — the most demanding and unforgiving surface in flat drywall finishing. The inward wheel placement eliminates the tracking issues common in standard flat boxes on butt seams, delivering a smooth, flat finish that reduces sanding time and raises the quality of every coat. Compatible with all major flat box handles and backed by a 5-year manufacturer warranty.

## Key Features

- **30% Higher Mud Capacity:** Significantly extends run time between pump refills, boosting productivity on large finishing projects.
- **Inside Track Wheel Design:** Wheels positioned inside the side plates for enhanced stability and precision tracking on butt joints.

name: Columbia Semi Auto Taper Drywall Taping Tool
description_short: Columbia Semi Auto Taperor "Bucket Taper" allows you to apply a specific amount of compound to a large volume of tape. No additional tools needed. Simply attach the Columbia Semi-Automatic Taper to a 5-Gallon bucket of compound and pull the tape through it. Very simple to use and even a beginner can use it with very little effort. It’s a great little tool for even the professionals that are doing smaller jobs and do not want to pull out their automatic taper.
description_full:
## Streamline Your Drywall Finishing

The Columbia Semi Auto Taper, often referred to as the "Bucket Taper," is the ultimate solution for contractors seeking speed and simplicity without the overhead of heavy-duty automatic taping systems. Designed to integrate directly with your standard 5-gallon compound bucket, this tool transforms your workflow by automating the application of joint compound to your tape.

## Efficiency for Every Job Site

Whether you are a novice learning the trade or a seasoned professional tackling smaller residential repairs, this tool offers unmatched convenience. By eliminating the need for complex machinery, you can achieve consistent, professional-grade results with minimal setup time. It is the perfect companion for those quick-turnaround jobs where deploying a full automatic taper is impractical.

## Key Features

- **Direct Bucket Integration:** Mounts effortlessly to any standard 5-gallon compound bucket for immediate use.
- **Consistent Compound Application:** Precisely coats tape with the ideal amount of compound, reducing waste and ensuring a smooth finish.
- **Beginner-Friendly Design:** Intuitive operation allows users of all skill levels to achieve professional results with minimal training.
- **Portable and Lightweight:** Ideal for small-scale projects, patch work, and tight spaces where heavy equipment is cumbersome.
- **Time-Saving Workflow:** Drastically reduces prep time by removing the need for additional tools or complex loading procedures.

name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt
description_short: SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability.
description_full:
## Elevate Your Workflow with SurPro S2 Precision Stilts

Experience the pinnacle of professional-grade stability with the SurPro S2 Magnesium Double-Sided Stilts. Engineered for the demanding drywall contractor, these stilts redefine job-site efficiency by minimizing fatigue and maximizing balance. By utilizing a sophisticated double-sided pole architecture, the S2 series provides a rock-solid foundation that allows you to maneuver with confidence, whether you are hanging board, taping, or finishing ceilings.

## Unmatched Comfort and Structural Integrity

Designed to withstand the rigors of daily heavy-duty use, the S2 features a lightweight yet incredibly durable magnesium-alloy frame. The innovative 360-degree wraparound leg bands move in harmony with your natural gait, eliminating the pressure points common in traditional single-pole designs. With a fully customizable fit—including adjustable calf height, footbed length, and lean tension—these stilts adapt to your specific biomechanics, ensuring you remain productive from the first hour to the last.

## Key Features

- **Interlock Safety System:** Patented redundancy technology provides peace of mind by securing all critical stress points during operation.
- **Hex-Extruded Frame:** The unique hexagonal geometry offers superior structural rigidity while maintaining a lightweight profile for all-day wear.
- **Double-Clamshell Design:** Enhances lateral stability and prevents the twisting motion often found in standard stilts, ensuring a consistent, balanced stance.
- **Precision Adjustability:** Features comprehensive customization for leg band positioning, footplate length, and forward/backward lean tension.
- **High-Traction Soles:** Industrial-grade, non-marking rubber soles deliver exceptional grip on both residential and commercial flooring surfaces.

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| Brand | SurPro |
| Model | S2 Magnesium Double Sided |
| SKU | SURS2M2030 |
| Height Range | 20" - 30" |
| Max Load Capacity | 225 lbs (per pair) |
| Frame Material | Magnesium Alloy |
| Safety System | Interlock Enhanced Safety System |
| Sole Type | Non-marking, High-Grip Rubber |

name: TapeTech 12" EasyClean Finishing Box
description_short: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass.
description_full:
## Master Professional Drywall Finishing

Achieve flawless, high-production results with the TapeTech 12" EasyClean Finishing Box. Engineered for efficiency, this tool streamlines the drywall finishing process by simultaneously dispensing the precise volume of joint compound and feathering edges on both flat and butt joints. Whether you are tackling walls or ceilings, this box ensures a consistent, professional-grade finish in a single pass, significantly reducing manual labor and rework.

## Precision Control and Versatility

Designed for the demands of professional contractors, the EasyClean system features an intuitive crown adjustment dial. This allows for seamless transitions between the initial embedding coat and subsequent finishing layers, ensuring the perfect amount of compound is applied every time. Furthermore, the integrated pivoting axle automatically compensates for uneven drywall surfaces, maintaining optimal contact and a smooth, level finish even when one side of the joint sits higher than the other.

## Key Features

- **EasyRoll™ Wheel System:** Integrated wheels allow for rapid finishing of outside corner beads—up to twice as fast as manual methods—without requiring additional attachments.
- **Universal Compatibility:** The EasyRoll system is compatible with metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose corner beads, providing a stable, guided path for the finishing blade.
- **Superior Alignment:** Engineered to align perfectly with the finishing blade, these wheels eliminate the need to tilt the box, ensuring a clean, uniform application.
- **Enhanced Stability:** The wide-shoulder wheel design provides superior tracking, making it easier to maintain the box on the corner bead throughout the entire pass.
- **Multi-Functional Performance:** Ideal for embedding tape and applying final coats on both flat and butt joints, maximizing versatility on the job site.

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| Brand | TapeTech |

| SKU | TTTEZ12TT |

| Compatibility | Metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose beads |
| Key Technology | EasyClean® and EasyRoll™ systems |

description_full:
## Protect Your Investment with Precision Lubrication

Ensure your Automatic Taping and Finishing (ATF) tools perform at their peak with TapeTech Bazooka Oil. Engineered specifically for the rigorous demands of professional drywall finishing, this specialized aerosol lubricant provides a critical moisture barrier that shields internal components from rust and corrosion. By maintaining smooth, friction-free operation, this formula helps you achieve consistent results while significantly extending the service life of your equipment.

## Why Choose Specialized Lubrication?

Standard solvent-based lubricants, such as WD-40, can cause irreversible degradation to the delicate rubber gaskets, wipers, and O-rings found in your taping tools. TapeTech Bazooka Oil is chemically engineered to be compatible with these sensitive materials, ensuring your tools remain sealed and operational without the risk of premature component failure. Whether you are maintaining a TapeTech Automatic Taper, a Mud Runner, or other high-performance ATF systems, this oil is the industry-standard choice for reliability.

## Key Features

- **Corrosion Defense:** Creates a robust water-repellent barrier that prevents oxidation and rust on critical metal parts.
- **Seal Compatibility:** Specifically formulated to be safe for use with rubber gaskets, O-rings, and wipers, preventing swelling or cracking.
- **Optimized Performance:** Reduces internal friction to ensure smooth, effortless operation during high-volume taping jobs.
- **Professional Grade:** The preferred maintenance solution for TapeTech Automatic Tapers, Mud Runners, and a wide range of ATF finishing tools.
- **Easy Application:** Convenient aerosol spray format allows for precise, mess-free application to hard-to-reach internal mechanisms.
